description:
You don't need to write code to use the most powerful AI coding tool on the planet.

In this video, I walk through my top 10 Claude Code tips for non-engineers — the exact playbook I use every day to run multiple AI agents that write content, build projects, and do work that used to take a full week... in minutes.

We go step by step from downloading the app to running multi-agent workflows:

1) Installing Claude Code (desktop, mobile, and browser options)
2) Setting up CLAUDE.md as your project's "brain"
3) Getting Claude to explain everything in plain English
4) Using Plan Mode so Claude plans before it acts
5) Training Claude on YOUR content with real examples
6) Installing skills that turn Claude into a specialist
7) Using the Chrome extension for in-browser automation
8) Building slash commands for repeatable workflows
9) Running multiple agents at the same time
10) Adding one-click plugins and MCP servers (Context7, Asana, and more)

Whether you're a creator, founder, marketer, or just curious — this is your starting point.

I use Claude Code on the $100/month Max plan (not sponsored). It's the best money I spend every month.

LINKS 🔗
→ GET THE FULL RESOURCE GUIDE (free): https://github.com/JJenglert1/claude-code-for-beginners-tips
→ Follow JJ on X: https://x.com/JJEnglert
→ Subscribe to Ultrathink (free weekly AI newsletter for 40K+ execs & builders): https://www.tenex.co/ultrathink?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=claude-beginner-tips&referrer=JJ
→ Get started with Tenex for AI Transformation: https://www.tenex.co?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=claude-beginner-tips&referrer=JJ

Includes: step-by-step setup guide, curated video tutorials, skill libraries, MCP server directories, written guides, community links, and a starter CLAUDE.md template you can copy-paste.

TIMESTAMPS ⏰

13:35 Tip 6 Preview — Skills, Plugins, Hooks, and MCP Servers
13:49 Importing Skills into Your Project
14:46 Auto-Invoking Skills + Agent Browser Demo
